title: Midnight Sunset
lyrics:
Verse 1:
In the morning light, I wake up feeling free
The city's alive, and so am I, it's all I need
The sun is shining bright, a gentle breeze on my skin
I take a deep breath in, and let the world spin
I feel the music playing, a rhythm in my soul
A melody that whispers, "You're in control"

Chorus:
Oh, I'm drifting on a cloud, with my heart full of cheer
Everything is falling into place, and my dreams are clear
I'm lost in the beauty, of this endless day
With every step I take, I find my way

Verse 2:
In the quiet hours, I find my peaceful place
Where love and laughter linger, and time stands still in space
The stars come out to dance, a twinkling show above
I feel the universe smiling, with a gentle, endless love
I let my spirit soar, on the wings of a gentle breeze
And I feel the magic, that the world brings to me

Chorus:
Oh, I'm drifting on a cloud, with my heart full of cheer
Everything is falling into place, and my dreams are clear
I'm lost in the beauty, of this endless day
With every step I take, I find my way
